_comment: Evaluation dataset for the TechCorp Annual Report 2023 sample PDF. Each item has a question, expected answer, and topic tags for metric analysis.

questions.question: What was TechCorp's total revenue in fiscal year 2023?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp's total revenue in fiscal year 2023 was $2.84 billion, representing a 23% increase over 2022.

questions.question: Which division had the highest year-over-year revenue growth in 2023?
questions.expected_answer: The AI Platform division had the highest year-over-year revenue growth in 2023 at 217%, growing from $120 million in 2022 to $380 million in 2023.

questions.question: What was TechCorp's net income and net margin in 2023?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp's net income in 2023 was $412 million with a 14.5% net margin.

questions.question: How much did TechCorp invest in R&D in 2023, and what percentage of revenue did it represent?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp invested $520 million in R&D in 2023, which represented 18.3% of total revenue — the highest in company history.

questions.question: What was TechCorp's revenue in Asia-Pacific in 2023 and how fast did it grow?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp's Asia-Pacific revenue was $540 million in 2023, representing 19% of total revenue and growing 41% year-over-year — the fastest-growing region.

questions.question: What is TechCorp's revenue guidance for fiscal year 2024?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp's revenue guidance for FY2024 is $3.35–$3.50 billion, representing approximately 18–23% year-over-year growth.

questions.question: How did TechCorp's quarterly revenue trend throughout 2023?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp showed consistent acceleration: Q1 $612M, Q2 $682M, Q3 $745M, Q4 $801M, with gross margin expanding from 68% in Q1 to 72% in Q4.

questions.question: What was TechCorp's employee headcount at the end of 2023 and how did it change from 2022?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp had 17,800 employees at the end of 2023, up from 14,200 in 2022.

questions.question: What is TechCorp's planned capital expenditure for 2024 and how will it be allocated?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp plans $380 million in capital expenditure for 2024: 60% for data center expansion in Mumbai, São Paulo, and Frankfurt, and 40% for on-premise infrastructure refresh for the Enterprise Software division.

questions.question: What was TechCorp's customer retention rate and Net Revenue Retention in 2023?
questions.expected_answer: TechCorp's customer retention rate was 94% in 2023, and Net Revenue Retention (NRR) reached 118%, indicating strong upsell momentum.
